sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَتِ الْأَخْبَارُ تَنْتَشِرُ بِسُرْعَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ عَبْرَ الْهَوَاتِفِ الذَّكِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Vijesti su se počele širiti veoma brzo putem pametnih telefona.
sentences.translationEn: News has started to spread very quickly via smartphones.

sentences.arabic: يَقْرأُ النَّاسُ آخِرَ التَّطَوُّرَاتِ فِي الْعَالَمِ مِنْ خِلَالِ التَّطْبِيقَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi čitaju o najnovijim dešavanjima u svijetu putem aplikacija.
sentences.translationEn: People read about the latest developments in the world through applications.

sentences.arabic: لَكِنْ يَجِبُ التَّأَكُدُ مِنْ مَصْدَرِ الْخَبَرِ قَبْلَ نَشْرِهِ لِلْآخَرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Ali se mora provjeriti izvor vijesti prije nego što se podijeli s drugima.
sentences.translationEn: But one must verify the source of the news before sharing it with others.
